mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity_checkin ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT ac.id, ac.activity_id AS activityId, ac.volunteer_id AS volunteerId, ac.checkin_time AS checkinTime, ac.checkout_time AS checkoutTime, ac.service_hours AS serviceHours, ac.earned_points AS earnedPoints, ac.status, ac.remark, v.real_name AS volunteerName, a.title AS activityName FROM activity_checkin ac LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON ac.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN activity a ON ac.activity_id = a.id ORDER BY ac.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM activity_checkin WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(service_hours), 0) FROM activity_checkin WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = 2
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(earned_points), 0) FROM activity_checkin WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = 2 AND is_counted = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_checkin (activity_id, volunteer_id, checkin_time, checkout_time, service_hours, earned_points, status, is_valid, is_counted, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{volunteerId}, #{checkinTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{serviceHours}, #{earnedPoints}, #{status}, #{isValid}, #{isCounted}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE activity_checkin SET activity_id = #{activityId}, volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}, checkin_time = #{checkinTime}, checkout_time = #{checkoutTime}, service_hours = #{serviceHours}, earned_points = #{earnedPoints}, status = #{status}, is_valid = #{isValid}, is_counted = #{isCounted}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(service_hours), 0) FROM activity_checkin WHERE checkout_time IS NOT NULL
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(service_hours), 0) FROM activity_checkin WHERE checkout_time IS NOT NULL AND checkout_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(checkout_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') as date, HOUR(checkout_time) as hour, COALESCE(SUM(service_hours), 0) as hours FROM activity_checkin WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = 2 AND is_counted = 1 AND checkout_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(checkout_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00'), HOUR(checkout_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(checkout_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, DAYOFWEEK(checkout_time) as dayOfWeek, COALESCE(SUM(service_hours), 0) as hours FROM activity_checkin WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = 2 AND is_counted = 1 AND checkout_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{weeks} WEEK) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(checkout_time, '%Y-%m-%d'), DAYOFWEEK(checkout_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(checkout_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, DAY(checkout_time) as day, COALESCE(SUM(service_hours), 0) as hours FROM activity_checkin WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = 2 AND is_counted = 1 AND checkout_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(checkout_time, '%Y-%m-%d'), DAY(checkout_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(checkout_time, '%Y-%m') as month, MONTH(checkout_time) as monthNum, COALESCE(SUM(service_hours), 0) as hours FROM activity_checkin WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = 2 AND is_counted = 1 AND checkout_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{years} YEAR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(checkout_time, '%Y-%m'), MONTH(checkout_time) ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT activity_id) FROM activity_checkin WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = 2 AND is_counted = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_checkin ac JOIN activity a ON ac.activity_id = a.id WHERE ac.volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND ac.checkin_time IS NOT NULL AND ABS(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ac.checkin_time, a.start_time)) <= 30
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_checkin WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = 2 AND is_counted = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_checkin ac INNER JOIN activity a ON ac.activity_id = a.id WHERE ac.status = 2 AND ac.is_counted = 1 AND ac.checkin_time IS NOT NULL AND ABS(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ac.checkin_time, a.start_time)) <= 30
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_checkin WHERE status = 2 AND is_counted = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(earned_points), 0) FROM activity_checkin WHERE status = 2 AND is_counted = 1
